SEARCH
Packages com.ta.util

Classes DataManager

java.lang.Object
com.ta.util.DataManager
public class DataManager extends Object
Data access and plain-text persistence gateway.

This class centralizes read/write operations for users, positions, applications, profiles, logs and notifications. It exposes convenience aggregation methods used by servlets (for example admin dashboard and TA workload summaries) and implements a simple file-based storage model using pipe-separated text files under the configured data directory.

  • Constructor\ Summary

    Constructor
    Constructor
    Description
    DataManager()
    Constructs the DataManager, resolves the runtime data directory and ensures required files exist (creates defaults when needed).

      public DataManager()
      Constructs the DataManager, resolves the runtime data directory and ensures required files exist (creates defaults when needed).

    • getDataDirPath

      public Path getDataDirPath()
      Returns the resolved runtime data directory path used by this instance.
      返回:
      data directory path

    • getAllUsers

      public List<User> getAllUsers()
      Reads all user records from storage.
      返回:
      list of User

    • getUserById

      public User getUserById(String userId)
      Finds a User by userId (case-insensitive).
      参数:
      userId - id to lookup
      返回:
      User or null

    • validateLogin

      public User validateLogin(String userId, String password)
      Validates login credentials; only active accounts are allowed.
      参数:
      userId - login id
      password - password
      返回:
      User if valid and active; null otherwise

    • saveUser

      public void saveUser(User user)
      Saves a single user record, overwriting existing entry by userId.
      参数:
      user - user to save

      public void writeLog(String userId, String userName, String role, String action, String detail, String result)
      追加写入操作日志。

    • getLogs

      public List<Map<String,String>> getLogs()
      读取日志并按时间倒序返回。

    • getAnalyticsSummary

      public Map<String,Object> getAnalyticsSummary()
      计算管理员分析页的总览统计。

    • getTaWorkloadSummary

      public List<Map<String,Object>> getTaWorkloadSummary()
      计算 TA 工作负载聚合。

      统计口径：

      • totalApplications：该 TA 申请总数
      • pending：非 approved/rejected/canceled 的申请数
      • approved/rejected/canceled：按状态精确计数
      • currentLoad：当前实现等于 approved 数量
